statements.sql:
insert into `core_news_translations` (`locale`, `origin_id`, `title`, `content`, `create_user`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('en', 197, 'Experience meditation in the most tranquil area on Cat Ba Island.', '

For a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island, visitors should head to the core zone of Cat Ba National Park or secluded valleys such as Viet Hai village. These are spaces with absolute tranquility, surrounded by primeval forest and a diverse ecosystem, helping the mind easily reach a state of deep relaxation and the most effective healing of body and soul.

 

Why should you try a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island?

 

Cat Ba Island is famous not only for its turquoise beaches and majestic limestone mountains, but also as a "sanctuary" for those seeking inner peace. Undertaking a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island offers values that no modern studio in the city can match.

 

The perfect blend of forest and sea energy

 

When you choose to meditate here, you are receiving pure energy from a World Biosphere Reserve. The quiet space sharpens your senses. The rustling of forest leaves, the chirping of birds, and the oxygen-rich air create a natural relaxation "matrix" that quickly lowers the level of cortisol (the stress hormone) in your blood.

 

Complete separation from urban noise

 

The most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island is usually deep within the valleys or on the high mountain peaks, where the phone signal is weak and there is no sound of vehicle engines. This is the ideal condition for practicing breath-observation exercises and inner reflection without being distracted by external factors.

 

 

Where is the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island to practice meditation?

 

To have a true meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island, choosing the location determines 70% of your success. Below are the top suggestions from healing experts:

 

1. The core zone of Cat Ba National Park – Ngu Lam Peak

 

If you want to combine walking meditation and seated meditation, Ngu Lam Peak is a not-to-be-missed choice. After a mountain climb, you will stand amid a vast space, looking down on the lush green vegetation. This is one of the spots that offers a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island, thanks to its altitude and separation from residential areas.

 

2. The valley of the ancient Viet Hai village

 

Located deep within the national park and accessible only by forest trail or by sea, Viet Hai is like an isolated island. The space here is so quiet that you can clearly hear the sound of your own breathing. Many people come here to undertake multi-day meditation retreats because of its rare peacefulness.

 

3. The pristine beaches of Lan Ha Bay in the early morning

 

Although Lan Ha Bay has many tourists, at dawn—when the boats have not yet set out—the small sandy coves nestled against the limestone cliffs are the ideal place for a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island. The feeling of sitting on the fine sand, listening to the gentle lapping of the waves, helps you easily enter a state of concentration.

 

 

The process for an effective meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island

 

To make this article a true how-to guide, let's go through the steps to optimize your meditation session amid pristine nature.



    • Prepare your mindset and attire: Choose loose, moisture-wicking clothing. Bring a thin meditation mat or simply a large towel to sit on.

 

    • Travel to your chosen location: Begin the journey early in the morning (around 5:00–6:00 a.m.). A gentle walk to the meditation spot is also a way to warm up the mind.

 

    • Settle into your sitting position: Find a flat surface under an old tree or on a large rock facing the valley. Make sure your spot is safe and well-ventilated.

 

    • Practice nature-observation meditation: Instead of closing your eyes right away, spend 5 minutes observing the scenery around you. Then slowly close your eyes and focus on the natural sounds of the meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island.

 

    • Finish and relax: After about 20–30 minutes of deep meditation, rub your hands together until warm, place them over your eyes, and slowly open your eyes. Take a few more minutes to enjoy the surrounding space before moving on.



In addition, discover many more high-quality travel experiences at Vietnamtoure.com

 

 

The outstanding health benefits of a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island

 

Many scientific studies have shown that meditating in a natural environment like Cat Ba is twice as effective as meditating indoors.



    • Boosting the immune system: The air in Cat Ba's primeval forest area contains plenty of phytoncides (natural antibiotics from trees), which help increase the natural killer cells in the body.

 

    • Improving sleep quality: After a day of doing the meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island, your nervous system will be soothed, helping you fall easily into a deep sleep.

 

    • Balancing emotions: The absolute tranquility helps you face negative emotions, transforming them into positive energy and peace.



 

 

 

Tips for the most complete meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island

 

To make your trip not just an ordinary sightseeing tour but a genuine healing journey, keep the following in mind:



    • Limit electronic devices: Put your phone on airplane mode. The purpose of seeking out a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island is to disconnect from the outside world and reconnect with yourself.

 

    • Choose the right time: Avoid holidays or peak tourist weekends. The ideal time is on weekdays or during the autumn and winter, when Cat Ba takes on its most serene, quiet appearance.

 

    • Go with a guide (if needed): If you are a beginner, having a meditation instructor or a company that specializes in healing tours will help you stay on the right track and achieve greater effectiveness.



 

 

 

Frequently asked questions about the meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island

 

Question 1: Do I need meditation experience before participating?

 

Not at all. The meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island is for everyone. The tranquility of nature is the best teacher to guide you in how to let go of pressure.

 

Question 2: Which season is the most beautiful for meditation in Cat Ba?

 

September to November is the most wonderful time. During this period the weather is cool, there is little rain, and the space is extremely quiet—perfectly suited for calming, contemplative activities.

 

Question 3: Do I need to bring any food or drinks?

 

You should bring drinking water and some nutritious nuts. Avoid bringing strongly scented food or littering the environment, in order to protect the purity of the meditation area.

 

Question 4: How much does a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island cost?

 

If you go on your own, the cost only includes the national park entrance ticket and transportation. If you join a professional healing tour from Eco Healing, the price will include a guide, shuttle service, and in-depth relaxation treatments.

 

 

A journey to find yourself in the heart of Cat Ba

 

Taking time for a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island is not merely a tourist activity, but a priceless gift you give to your own mental health. The Jade Island is not only about the sea; it also has wondrous moments of stillness waiting for you to discover. Amid the hectic pace of life, allow yourself to pause, listen to the voice of nature, and find peace in your soul.

 

We hope this article has given you a comprehensive view and the most helpful guidance to begin your own healing journey. Don't forget that true tranquility lies not in the place you go, but in the way you perceive it. However, an environment like the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island will certainly be a wonderful catalyst to help you reach that tranquility faster.

 

 

If you are looking for a professional partner to accompany you and optimize this journey, contact us right away.

 

LIEN MINH VIET International Trading Company Limited

 

ECO HEALING - Where Your Soul Is Healed!

 

Address: 102 My Dinh, Cau Giay, Hanoi

 

Phone: 0986662282

 

Email: support@virenaretreat.com Website: virenaretreat.com

    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Travel to your chosen location: Begin the journey early in the morning (around 5:00–6:00 a.m.). A gentle walk to the meditation spot is also a way to warm up the mind.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Settle into your sitting position: Find a flat surface under an old tree or on a large rock facing the valley. Make sure your spot is safe and well-ventilated.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Practice nature-observation meditation: Instead of closing your eyes right away, spend 5 minutes observing the scenery around you. Then slowly close your eyes and focus on the natural sounds of the </span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Finish and relax: After about 20–30 minutes of deep meditation, rub your hands together until warm, place them over your eyes, and slowly open your eyes. Take a few more minutes to enjoy the surrounding space before moving on.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; color: #e74c3c; background-color: #ffffff; vertical-align: baseline;">In addition, discover many more high-quality travel experiences at</span><a href="http://vietnamtoure.com/"><span style="font-size: 13pt; color: #e74c3c; background-color: #ffffff; vertical-align: baseline;"> Vietnamtoure.com</span></a></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/trai-nghiem-thien-dinh-tai-khu-vuc-yen-tinh-nhat-tren-dao-cat-ba-5.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">The outstanding health benefits of a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span></h2>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Many scientific studies have shown that meditating in a natural environment like Cat Ba is twice as effective as meditating indoors.</span></p>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Boosting the immune system: The air in Cat Ba's primeval forest area contains plenty of phytoncides (natural antibiotics from trees), which help increase the natural killer cells in the body.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Improving sleep quality: After a day of doing the </span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">, your nervous system will be soothed, helping you fall easily into a deep sleep.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Balancing emotions: The absolute tranquility helps you face negative emotions, transforming them into positive energy and peace.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/trai-nghiem-thien-dinh-tai-khu-vuc-yen-tinh-nhat-tren-dao-cat-ba-4.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Tips for the most complete meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span></h2>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">To make your trip not just an ordinary sightseeing tour but a genuine healing journey, keep the following in mind:</span></p>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Limit electronic devices: Put your phone on airplane mode. The purpose of seeking out a </span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> is to disconnect from the outside world and reconnect with yourself.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Choose the right time: Avoid holidays or peak tourist weekends. The ideal time is on weekdays or during the autumn and winter, when Cat Ba takes on its most serene, quiet appearance.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Go with a guide (if needed): If you are a beginner, having a meditation instructor or a company that specializes in healing tours will help you stay on the right track and achieve greater effectiveness.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/trai-nghiem-thien-dinh-tai-khu-vuc-yen-tinh-nhat-tren-dao-cat-ba-2.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Frequently asked questions about the meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span></h2>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Question 1: Do I need meditation experience before participating?</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Not at all. The </span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> is for everyone. The tranquility of nature is the best teacher to guide you in how to let go of pressure.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Question 2: Which season is the most beautiful for meditation in Cat Ba?</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">September to November is the most wonderful time. During this period the weather is cool, there is little rain, and the space is extremely quiet—perfectly suited for calming, contemplative activities.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Question 3: Do I need to bring any food or drinks?</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">You should bring drinking water and some nutritious nuts. Avoid bringing strongly scented food or littering the environment, in order to protect the purity of the meditation area.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Question 4: How much does a meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island cost?</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">If you go on your own, the cost only includes the national park entrance ticket and transportation. If you join a professional healing tour from </span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Eco Healing</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">, the price will include a guide, shuttle service, and in-depth relaxation treatments.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/trai-nghiem-thien-dinh-tai-khu-vuc-yen-tinh-nhat-tren-dao-cat-ba-1.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">A journey to find yourself in the heart of Cat Ba</span></h2>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Taking time for a </span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">meditation experience in the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> is not merely a tourist activity, but a priceless gift you give to your own mental health. The Jade Island is not only about the sea; it also has wondrous moments of stillness waiting for you to discover. Amid the hectic pace of life, allow yourself to pause, listen to the voice of nature, and find peace in your soul.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">We hope this article has given you a comprehensive view and the most helpful guidance to begin your own healing journey. Don't forget that true tranquility lies not in the place you go, but in the way you perceive it. However, an environment like the most peaceful area of Cat Ba Island will certainly be a wonderful catalyst to help you reach that tranquility faster.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/trai-nghiem-thien-dinh-tai-khu-vuc-yen-tinh-nhat-tren-dao-cat-ba-3.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">If you are looking for a professional partner to accompany you and optimize this journey, contact us right away.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">LIEN MINH VIET International Trading Company Limited </span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">ECO HEALING - Where Your Soul Is Healed!</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Address:</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> 102 My Dinh, Cau Giay, Hanoi</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Phone:</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> 0986662282</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 14.6667px;"><strong>Email: <a href="mailto:support@virenaretreat.com">support@virenaretreat.com</a> Website: virenaretreat.com</strong></span></span></p>
